title: 04.21.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: April 21, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: 04.21.26 Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for April 10, 2026 through April 16, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.subcategory: Weekly Reports – Public Records, Media, Code Enforcement
fields.tldr: This memorandum transmits weekly activity reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council covering April 10–16, 2026. The attached reports detail public records requests received by category (police, fire, and general), media inquiries handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The public records log shows a high volume of requests, predominantly for police reports, fire department records, and building/permit documents. Multiple requestors submitted numerous records requests on the same date, suggesting institutional or legal inquiry activity.
fields.key_stats: Reporting period: April 10–16, 2026. Public records log run date: April 17, 2026 at 2:02 AM. At least 58 public records requests are visible across the truncated 14-page report. Dominant request types: Police Reports, Building Plans/Blueprints/Permits, Fire Prevention Records, and Incident Reports. Notable high-volume individual requestors include Yen Dinh (7+ requests on 4/10) and Wendy Digiorno (9+ requests on 4/11).
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review attached reports: (A) Public Records Requests – City Clerk's Office, (B) Weekly Media Requests – Strategic Communications, (C) Weekly Code Enforcement Service Requests – Code Enforcement.
